items.name_cn:
Grey Peekaboo X-tote
Classic Monogram canvas paired with the classic Peekaboo rotating buckle. The overall look is both premium and retro, especially suitable for a mature style. The bag is very lightweight, making it a great choice for daily work commutes!
1819B98
Size 41x16x30cm

items.name_en: Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU Medium Bag, Cognac full-grain leather, large hand-stitched, classic turn-lock on both sides. Suede lining in the same color, two compartments separated by hard partitions, interior pocket with button and vintage gold metal fittings. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 33*25.5*13cm

items.name_en: Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU Small Bag, hand-stitched with 306 large visible stitches, representing the Selleria classic craftsmanship passed down by FENDI artisans since 1925. Selected Cuoio Romano leather, calfskin with natural grain, tanned without any metal. Lined with calfskin, divided into two exposed interior compartments by a Cuoio Romano leather hard partition, with an interior pocket. Silver Selleria plaque, silver-finished metal fittings. Classic turn-lock on both sides. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody

items.name_cn:
In stock 🔥
Iconic Medium Baguette handbag, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Adorned with FF buckle. Features front flap, magnetic closure, internal compartment with deep brown fabric lining, zip pocket, and gold metal hardware. The bag comes with a detachable leather handle and shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 26x15.5cm
Style 8600

items.name_en: In stock 🔥 Iconic square Baguette mini bag from the Versace by Fendi series. Gold leather material, featuring gold laser-punched FF pattern, resembling Versace metal mesh. Three Medusa metal pins adorn the front flap. FF closure features a pin. Magnetic closure, FF fabric lined interior compartment, interior pocket, and gold-finish metal hardware. Equipped with a long handle and detachable shoulder strap, for underarm carry or crossbody. 8BS066LM900

items.name_cn:
Large
Monogram Latest Trend Origami Magic Bag
Classic monogram paired with dark brown calfskin, full of a premium feel. Eight hidden magnetic closures allow the handbag to cleverly transform into a tote bag or fold into an Origami (origami) style bucket bag. A bag for two ways to carry is amazing! Transformable tote, transformable bucket~ There are three sizes to meet our different needs for bag capacity. The more you look, the more you like it.
Large model: 0894. 32.5cmx32.5cmx27.5cm

items.name_cn:
Large Caramel
Brand new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, the first FEND1, subverting the previous bag shape, metal trim large Logo lock plus body design combines architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Handheld for evening parties is full of aura, crossbody also has a high-end street chic feel!
Large 127 Dimensions 32.5x15x23.5cm

items.name_cn:
Large Monogram
New FENDI First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first FENDI bag, overturning previous shapes. Metal trim and large logo lock combined with the body design deconstructs architectural art and fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for evening clutching, and crossbody gives a high-end street chic feel!
Large Size 32.5x15x23.5cm
